name: Meta Platforms Inc.
description: Social media and metaverse company behind Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Threads.

name: Alphabet Inc. (Google)
description: Search, cloud, and AI conglomerate behind Google Search, YouTube, Cloud, and DeepMind.

name: Amazon.com Inc.
description: E-commerce and cloud computing giant. Parent of AWS.

name: Microsoft Corporation
description: Enterprise software, cloud (Azure), and AI leader. Major investor in OpenAI.

name: Oracle Corporation
description: Database and enterprise cloud software giant.

name: Apple Inc.
description: Consumer electronics and services. Developing Apple Intelligence.

name: Tesla Inc.
description: Electric vehicle and clean energy company with major AI/autonomy investments.

name: Salesforce Inc.
description: CRM and enterprise cloud software leader with Einstein AI platform.

name: Intel Corporation
description: Semiconductor chip manufacturer investing in AI chip fabrication.

name: IBM Corporation
description: Enterprise IT, consulting, and AI (watsonx) company.

name: SAP SE
description: Enterprise resource planning (ERP) software leader with AI copilot Joule.

name: Cisco Systems Inc.
description: Networking hardware and enterprise technology company.

name: PayPal Holdings Inc.
description: Digital payments platform integrating AI for fraud detection and commerce.

name: Spotify Technology SA
description: Music and podcast streaming service with AI-powered recommendations and AI DJ.

name: Uber Technologies Inc.
description: Ride-hailing and delivery platform investing in autonomous vehicle AI.

name: Lyft Inc.
description: Ride-sharing platform with AI-driven pricing and routing.

name: X Corp. (formerly Twitter)
description: Social media platform, now private. Developing Grok AI via xAI.

name: Snap Inc.
description: Camera and social media company behind Snapchat and My AI chatbot.

name: Netflix Inc.
description: Streaming entertainment service using AI for recommendations and content production.

name: Shopify Inc.
description: E-commerce platform with AI-powered merchant tools (Shopify Magic).

name: Nvidia Corporation
description: AI chip and computing leader. Dominant supplier of GPUs for AI training.

name: Dell Technologies Inc.
description: PC, server, and IT infrastructure company pivoting to AI servers.
